---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve claude-duet
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `npx claude-duet ...`
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or unexpected output.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)
- **claude-duet version**: (run `npx claude-duet --version`)

## Connection Mode

Which connection mode were you using?

- [ ] LAN Direct (`npx claude-duet host`)
- [ ] SSH Tunnel (`ssh -L ...`)
- [ ] Cloudflare Tunnel (`--tunnel cloudflare`)
- [ ] Self-hosted Relay (`--relay wss://...`)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots about the problem here.
